description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box with a natural, light brown finish and visible wood grain patterns across all sides. The box features a recessed panel design on each face, giving it a sturdy and reinforced appearance. The top surface is flat and bordered by a raised frame, suggesting it could be stacked or used as a support surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, indicating a simple construction likely intended for general storage. The wood texture is consistent and the box appears solid, with no transparent or open sections. Its robust build and neutral design make it suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, cubic wooden storage box with a natural wood grain finish and recessed panel design, suitable for general storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed panel and wood grain details on the face, with a raised border around the top.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the consistent wood grain and panel design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to other sides, with visible wood grain and recessed panel.
description_view_3: Rear view, matching the other faces with the same panel and wood grain pattern.
